goal: Migrate from raft-rs 0.7 to openraft 0.9 to eliminate prost dependency conflicts and gain cleaner trait APIs

phases.name: Type System & Configuration
phases.description: Define openraft type configuration and conversion utilities

tasks.name: Define RaftTypeConfig
tasks.notes: RaftTypeConfig with NodeId=u64, Entry=LogEntry<Request>, SnapshotData=Vec<u8>. All associated types implemented.

tasks.name: Create Type Conversions
tasks.notes: Conversions: eraftpb::Entry → LogEntry, HardState → Vote + LogId, ConfState → Membership.

tasks.name: Property Test Conversions
tasks.notes: Round-trip property tests for all type conversions. 1000+ random inputs.

phases.name: Storage Layer
phases.description: Adapt MemStorage to openraft storage traits

tasks.name: Implement RaftLogReader
tasks.notes: RaftLogReader trait: get_log_state, try_get_log_entries, read_vote. Uses RwLock<BTreeMap>.

tasks.name: Implement RaftSnapshotBuilder
tasks.notes: RaftSnapshotBuilder trait: build_snapshot. Delegates to StateMachine::snapshot().

tasks.name: Implement RaftStorage Trait
tasks.notes: RaftStorage trait: save_vote, append, delete_conflict_logs_since, purge_logs_upto, apply_to_state_machine.

tasks.name: Migrate Storage Tests
tasks.notes: 85+ tests migrated to async #[tokio::test]. All passing.

phases.name: State Machine Integration
phases.description: Wrap existing StateMachine with openraft trait

tasks.name: Create StateMachine Wrapper
tasks.notes: OpenRaftStateMachine wrapper holding Arc<RwLock<StateMachine>>.

tasks.name: Implement apply() with Idempotency
tasks.notes: Preserves idempotency: index > last_applied check. Applies Set and Del operations.

tasks.name: Implement Snapshot Methods
tasks.notes: snapshot() and restore() using bincode serialization.

tasks.name: Comprehensive Idempotency Tests
tasks.notes: Tests for duplicate rejection, out-of-order rejection, last_applied tracking.

phases.name: Network Stub
phases.description: Create minimal RaftNetwork implementation for testing

tasks.name: Define StubNetwork Struct
tasks.notes: StubNetwork struct with node_id. Logging instrumentation.

tasks.name: Implement RaftNetwork Trait
tasks.notes: RaftNetwork trait with #[async_trait]. All methods return Ok with logging.

tasks.name: Test Stub Network
tasks.notes: Tests for no panics, tracing output, concurrent calls.

tasks.name: Update Cargo Dependencies
tasks.notes: Removed raft-rs, added openraft 0.9. Single prost 0.14 version throughout.

tasks.name: Migrate RaftNode Initialization
tasks.notes: async fn new() creates openraft::Raft instance. Config with election/heartbeat timeouts.

tasks.name: Migrate propose() to client_write()
tasks.notes: propose() uses raft.client_write(Request { data }). Extracts response from ClientWriteResponse.

tasks.name: Migrate Remaining API Methods
tasks.notes: is_leader(), get_leader_id(), get_metrics() using raft.metrics(). Removed tick() and handle_ready().

tasks.name: Migrate RaftNode Tests
tasks.notes: 26 tests converted to async #[tokio::test]. All passing.

phases.name: Integration & Cleanup
phases.description: Final testing, verification, and code cleanup

tasks.name: End-to-End Integration Tests
tasks.notes: 16 integration tests: single node, multi-node, concurrent ops, large payloads.

tasks.name: Verify Prost Conflict Resolved
tasks.notes: cargo tree shows single prost 0.14. No version conflicts.

tasks.name: Remove raft-rs Code
tasks.notes: No raft:: imports, no eraftpb, no RawNode references. cargo clippy clean.

tasks.name: Update Documentation
tasks.notes: Updated READMEs to mention openraft. Module docs reflect new structure.

tasks.name: Final Validation
tasks.notes: 751 tests passing. Zero warnings. Zero prost conflicts. Ready for gRPC transport.
